entries.gt_18e6fcbb43a45d: one successful retreat does not mean the attack is over
entries.gt_19f01131f3ed8e: more dangerous in water, weaker under dry light
entries.gt_1ae430f69f4e73: an enemy HQ is no place to test a grenade
entries.gt_1b3d18bb0f05d0: 9mm is also needed by the PPSh and homemade guns; count your spending
entries.gt_1b9599a403d4e1: sometimes gets through if the inspection is tired
entries.gt_1bff6d197d5082: If the price of filters went up, soon someone will go into the fog with a wet rag. Do not be that person.
entries.gt_1c267b80342109: better to report the sample than explain it from your pocket
entries.gt_1d6ae8435dd673: wait for the windup, step aside, and answer with a heavy hit
entries.gt_1e9d923e711638: check the floor, sound, and map before exiting
entries.gt_1eb02ce479f125: carry rubles, coupons, and small barter
entries.gt_1ed596ae200d78: tinned stew is valued by the kitchen, neighbors, and hungry caravans
entries.gt_1eff1aff3d055e: If your backpack is full, you have already made your choice: only fighting or turning back from here.
entries.gt_1f411f8d38d01e: If the bathroom is near and the corridor is quiet, go now. Combat will not wait for the household schedule.
entries.gt_1f47cac673d05a: heals and closes triage better than a bandage
entries.gt_1f58e60d5e9b10: If the beast is not coming to you, it may be waiting for the place where you come to it.
entries.gt_1f58ef8633a444: spread and consumption turn a bad position into an empty belt
entries.gt_1fc053a59ac508: Before a new floor, check water, food, a bandage, filter, and ammo. The lift does not have to return you to the storeroom.
entries.gt_205c2f18d6ad6e: gives satiety and rough skin protection
entries.gt_20b4d32609ea53: testing the plant with a knife is safe only on paper
entries.gt_20cddd2fcabd27: A liquidator checkpoint watches hands, weapons, and filter. Approach without sudden moves.
entries.gt_211ba9b4bec7bf: quick small healing before the doctor
entries.gt_212de6fdc1d95a: will ask for the bathroom later
entries.gt_213cca8291a5bf: stronger than a PM and good against a dangerous person
entries.gt_214204719bf9cd: Do not open a sample jar in the kitchen. Even if everyone is interested.
entries.gt_216d63b9a78977: shoots where you made noise last
entries.gt_2187d878ef4dcc: eating it without need is risky
entries.gt_21cd9a9cc94499: a bright room is not always safe if the enemy lives off the lamp
entries.gt_22155099cfc244: takes HP and spoils sample cleanliness
entries.gt_222868cedc11c4: gets the first shot from the water
entries.gt_2249b04dcfcbbf: do not pass close to iron; tap from a distance and keep buckshot ready
entries.gt_23007a0d240c92: after the slug, check the people nearby, not only the floor
entries.gt_238b8c16b1012c: If a door opens to someone else's voice, think why the voice needs your handle.
entries.gt_24db898796bf90: buy water, a bandage, and food before a sortie
entries.gt_251f042ec25f3f: the pain leaves, the debt remains
entries.gt_2585ab90f196f2: do not chase into darkness; keep a lit exit and cut the corner
entries.gt_25eceb66c34df4: after it, check PSI and do not return to the same dark corner
entries.gt_2651419e0b7992: a meat passage with no retreat works for it
entries.gt_266fd7fb8814b6: a queue can become a witness or cover
entries.gt_2688a2269bc78e: A killing without witnesses can still become a rumor through the corpse, blood, and an empty place in the schedule.
entries.gt_26f56ba837b278: do not stand by a fresh hole; keep a second exit and hit before the passage widens
entries.gt_27678041755613: counts time through the choir and spawns a threat
entries.gt_278090966e8e49: after the impulse, close the hermodoor instead of admiring it
entries.gt_27d2bbf59f3257: after the carrier, check which people changed their route
entries.gt_27ec487da1d8ee: they asked for it back before the siren
entries.gt_28013bd2f682ec: keeps the beast at arm's length
entries.gt_2828595d0312e9: take slime in a container, not with your hands and not in an open jar
entries.gt_283c59798a8442: Scientists pay for intact samples, repeatability, and the experiment log. An open jar is almost trash to them.
entries.gt_284d63a347d960: hide contraband or prepare an explanation
entries.gt_2891b44727bfd7: wakes up near loot and underfoot
entries.gt_28990b8f9a35bd: make noise to the side, change cells, and hit from another line
entries.gt_28e70f5bd5d947: useful against mycelium and as a reagent
entries.gt_28f7ce76ec2ac5: a sealed sample is worth more than a spoiled pocket
entries.gt_296b38221e48f1: Close the door after entering if you are not waiting for an ally. If you are waiting, watch who came with them.
entries.gt_296e654ca6d1e1: Vanka is useful for rumors, but he does not replace a map. Check any bypass with your feet.
entries.gt_29b286284cc843: check every new passage as temporary
entries.gt_29f9861dfa58b3: a long windup in a crowd may not finish in time
entries.gt_2a1d741e6c6e76: one door delays it, but does not cancel the fight
entries.gt_2aa5ea528cbb2e: spoils the office field and PSI
entries.gt_2aac3abbc3edf6: water strengthens some threats and ruins the filter
entries.gt_2b26f8f34e319c: carrying an archive packet through a Stamp-Eater without a weapon is expensive
entries.gt_2b735563bd5e8e: breaks quickly and is funny only until the first hit
entries.gt_2c4ef7c4cd5bad: it is easy to steal the wrong paper here
entries.gt_2c817bff9ae077: water underfoot can be part of the attack
entries.gt_2c9a7ef686cbaf: does not replace a bottle before the lower floor
entries.gt_2d6ddccdb324de: keep small goods and do not show evidence to everyone
entries.gt_2eaf86405b85f4: If the door jams, look for a bypass, a door kit, or a locksmith. Do not argue with your forehead.
entries.gt_2ece015b861324: a wet floor calls waterborne and crawling threats
entries.gt_2f30c490f9b700: Sleep before a raid is cheaper than a mistake from fatigue. Sleep where the door closes.
entries.gt_2f6568539e9d14: after a fogger, a filtering layer is useful if it dropped and the area is clean
entries.gt_2f7a6c297f86ff: interrupt the windup with a shot or a step aside
entries.gt_2fa830f2b6c610: for quarantine, this is an argument, not a decoration
entries.gt_2fb2d328a38aef: shorten the line of fire, disrupt the long shot, and do not carry extra papers
entries.gt_2fbafd112115b4: someone else's kitchen gives food, but someone else's drawer gives a witness
entries.gt_2fd42e906e36ae: a forgery is caught where they inspect the stamp
entries.gt_2feb97a5ba9644: after the Kontorshchik, check desks, but do not confuse evidence with trash
entries.gt_30d7f888dfbbde: the rumor about the bottle is often more dangerous than the bottle itself
entries.gt_310393007b0a80: after use, watch from behind the door
entries.gt_314b193fceb478: goes away entirely if handed over for a task
entries.gt_31537910e862bb: throw bread or meat farther than yourself, then hit the pack with buckshot or fire
entries.gt_319f0955de4f3c: quickly closes distance after a NET error
entries.gt_319ffaafb07dc3: briefly muffles PSI and can be smoke bait
entries.gt_31a636d3872a4d: quick thrust farther than a knife
entries.gt_31ca18c2bf6afa: good only for desperate small fry and a fight with an unarmed person
entries.gt_324478a9de3874: in the laundry room and cellar it is worth more than in the kitchen
entries.gt_32c29a18064eb1: one fast corpse brings a second if you get stuck
entries.gt_33d1249e044b78: Personal gratitude from an NPC is not love from the whole faction. But sometimes one saved neighbor opens the route you need.
entries.gt_33d51446043dde: comes for the smell of food
entries.gt_40924c82d13e22: Piece of red plastic after the alarm. The NII and liquidators take it as samosbor evidence.
entries.gt_423d686d2fc348: Roll of gray paper for the bathroom and small barter
entries.gt_44c43c5422769d: Work hammer. Damage 13. Faster than a wrench, shorter than a pipe. Durability 65
entries.gt_459380da7ec110: White photo after Veretar. The frame shows one extra room and the edge of a white bypass; useless as a map, dangerous as evidence.
entries.gt_481836210108db: Sealed test tube with cheap toxic residue after samosbor. Residents pay for a clean passage, the NII for an error report.
entries.gt_48cf364bca7980: Sealed ampoule with blue glow. The NII pays for an intact seal and a clean experiment log.
entries.gt_4aa9cf5fc6416a: Long hunting shotgun. Damage 8x8. Tighter, farther, and slower than a sawed-off. Buckshot
entries.gt_4b04326d57f550: Black tape for wires, seams, and quick temporary solutions.
entries.gt_4c0228af5aa4dd: Official paper for one pistol case. At the bureau it opens a legal homemade-gun purchase; an automatic weapon does not recognize it.
entries.gt_5031817c8b65ba: Who locked themselves in, who did not make it, who was crossed out.
entries.gt_510fc70c635023: Dry white sand from Veretar's white window. An open sample spoils food and papers; seal it, turn it in, or shake it out as dangerous evidence.
entries.gt_51569cc93b4ade: Short military spade. Damage 16. Reliable. Durability 100
entries.gt_516bec8f129cda: Heavy rare harpoons for water routes
entries.gt_5597d29c767bb6: Tag with a rubbed-off storeroom number. May point to a container or confuse a thief.
entries.gt_55e1eb358bf1c9: Brass tube of old pneumomail. Can be turned in, sold, or sent as evidence.
entries.gt_564582ca24dfaf: Working radio for reports and rumors. Useful where liquidators accept a signal.
entries.gt_5688b2fb596222: Forbidden NII impulse: 20 PSI. Kills a target no higher than your level.
entries.gt_58294fbb4c2c72: Document proves the right to an extra spoonful. With a forged card it becomes a denunciation.
entries.gt_59cdeda1d5bf42: Forgery: the stamp is straight, the paper is nervous.
entries.gt_5bf14ee9afb991: Empty magazine. A full one costs more.
entries.gt_5e5e8be156d680: Battered volume. Rarely read, often traded
entries.gt_5ea5405ac2b227: Food coupon with a greasy stamp. Usually redeemed for belyak; chernyak, krasnyak, and special ration require someone else's line.
entries.gt_6063f481431985: Patient card with a red clearance stripe.
entries.gt_61b25a8ec8c829: Dark figurine of unknown stone. Yakov needs an intact sample; cultists seek it as a shrine.
entries.gt_61f47493c39847: Roll of gray cloth for bandages, a filter, or barter with medics.
entries.gt_624be5e5ee7805: The ink smells of queue. Use with a blank, extract, or coupon to make a dangerous forgery.
entries.gt_62cffebb1920ac: Nine-mil for PM, homemade guns, and PPSh. Small currency of the armory and corridor
entries.gt_659442a36b9d05: Machine-gun belt. Heavy weight and heavy consumption
entries.gt_694e34e6d23fdc: Document after contact with white sand. The text is almost gone; it no longer works as a pass.
entries.gt_6b4d67287c23f2: Cult mark for passage, deception, or a report. Carry it away from food.
entries.gt_6da84ad05c8366: Passage through a wall: 16 PSI, 15s. Do not stop inside an obstacle.
entries.gt_6e1978394b74df: Signed by someone else's hand, too confidently.
entries.gt_6eb7b3b942df1a: Piece of felt with glue for a handle and jamb. The next door closes or opens noticeably quieter.
entries.gt_6f852895e6b876: Forced PSI capture: 18 PSI, target considers you an ally for 15s. Use this time to retreat.
entries.gt_7171a9ff9a3b95: Stiff wire for traps, door ties, and repairs.
entries.gt_71f2266caf7655: Rusty chain. Damage 14. Long, fast for its length, and uneven. Durability 75
entries.gt_73fdaa52288ed6: Rare energy cell for plasma, gauss, and BFG
entries.gt_77f7702b94d91f: Disposable squeaky suppressor. For a few seconds it cuts the range of your noise: shots are still heard, just worse.
entries.gt_78f96f67b3ae3b: Short pass to the District Council card archive.
entries.gt_7a4f3bfc8e0cd1: Document with a live bureau stamp.
entries.gt_7bafc99953166b: Slow sledgehammer. Damage 52. Big windup, big stop. Durability 85
entries.gt_7c2e9ee9553526: Pulsing shadow residue. Yakov asks you to keep it in a jar and not open it in the lift.
entries.gt_7dc9cfbd6a2bae: Wax seal without a case. You can turn it in, steal it, or attach it to a blank so the log accepts the sheet until the first cross-check.
entries.gt_8161dc94d35593: Permanent pass with a stamp. More useful than a temporary one until it is checked against the log.
entries.gt_81db8eed81ed46: Dry rubber for a hermodoor. Without it, the leaf hisses and lets fog through.
entries.gt_8644180d672b7f: Wet logbook with pipe numbers. Needed for repair, a report, or a denunciation.
